intended_use: brAIn™ Shoulder Positioning is intended to be used as an information tool to assist in the preoperative surgical planning and visualization of a primary total shoulder replacement.
intended_use_full: brAIn™ Shoulder Positioning is intended to be used as an information tool to assist in the preoperative surgical planning and visualization of a primary total shoulder replacement.
ground_truth: Manual segmentation performed by medical professionals; manual assessment by Clinical Solutions Specialist for shoulder side detection; expert-adjusted landmark positions for landmark validation
other_metrics: Dice Similarity Coefficient (DSC) for segmentation ≥0.95; Shoulder Side Detection accuracy; Landmark accuracy with 3 mm mean distance acceptance criterion; Measurement accuracy comparable to predicate device
